chunks.text: 1 ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Cr. Acquittal Appeal No.209 of 2023 Date Orders with Signatures of Judges Priority case 1. For orders on MA No.4462/2023 2. For hearing of main case 23.05.2025. None present for appellant. Ms. Seema Zaidi, APG This acquittal appeal, presented in office on 11.04.2023, was fixed for the first in Court on 10.05.2023 when two weeks’ time was granted to the learned counsel for the appellant to file legible copies of deposition of witnesses and statements of accused persons. On 26.05.2023 learned counsel against sought adjournment for filing the legible copies. However, today none is in attendance on behalf of the appellant. Even the legible copies of the depositions of witnesses and statement of accused have not been filed as yet. It appears that the appellant and his counsel lost interest in the matter and not pursuing the matter diligently. This acquittal appeal is accordingly dismissed for non-prosecution. Judge
